title: Insolvency Service Government Procurement Card transactions - April 2025 to March 2026
body: "The Insolvency Service uses the Government Procurement Card as a payment tool to help control spending on low value, high volume transactions. The use of cards is managed through the finance and commercial function and is governed by departmental policy and procedures and audited by internal audit functions.  Transaction information will be published here within 15 days of the end of each month and totals will be published at the end of the financial year. "
